result.status_detail: Gamma SSE captured: event:content x12 + event:done(data:stop) completion signal IDENTIFIED
console_errors: 4 console errors (intercom + gamma /graphql websocket warnings, unrelated to AI generation flow)
result.ai_response_text_summary: Korean outline of 10 cards about Seoul as the capital of South Korea, in markdown ``` ... ``` block. First chunk: '저는 서울이 대한민국의 수도라는 사실을 중심으로, 서울의 역사적 배경과 현재의 중요성을 간략하게 소개하는 프레젠테이션을 구성하겠습니다.'
key_response_fields: data (text chunk; can repeat across multiple data: lines per event per SSE spec)
result.event_sequence:
Sequence over a single POST that holds connection open as text/event-stream:
  1) event: content, id: 1, data: <first text chunk> (introductory prose)
  2..N) event: content, id: 2..N, data: <streaming text chunks>, content gradually emits intro prose then a fenced ```md ... ``` block containing card slides delimited by '--- {n}'
  Final) event: done, id: N+1, data: stop  <-- COMPLETION SIGNAL
Every SSE block is delimited by a blank line. Multiple data: lines within one event must be joined per the SSE spec to reconstruct the chunk. Observed in our capture: 12 'content' events + 1 'done' event = 13 total.
result.completion_signal_field_or_event: event: done   with payload   data: stop   (this is the unambiguous terminator; the connection then closes)
result.rendered_html_selector: div.react-renderer.node-card  (one per slide/card; outer wrapper is div.chakra-stack.card.css-bxg6n7; per-card heading is h1.block.block-heading.first-block.first-block-in-card)
result.websocket_url: wss://api.gamma.app/graphql  (observed but failed/closed early; secondary channel; AI generation itself is purely SSE over HTTPS)

screenshots_inventory.description: Initial gamma /create/generate page after prompt typed, before submit; Network panel cleared with Preserve log ON
Network EventStream tab for generation request showing 13 events: 12x type 'content' (Korean text) + final type 'done' with data 'stop'
Headers tab showing Content-Type: text/event-stream, Status 200 OK, Cache-Control no-cache no-store, Server cloudflare
DevTools Console showing querySelectorAll output enumerating div.react-renderer.node-card and h1.block.block-heading nodes for the rendered AI outline
VERBATIM SSE response body (13 events, 3.5KB). Use to rebuild gamma_sse template.

result.envelope_design_recommendation:
Gamma client expects pure SSE (Content-Type: text/event-stream) on POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation. The envelope MUST emit framed events of the form 'event: content
id: <int>
data: <chunk>

' for each token batch, then terminate with the EXACT sentinel 'event: done
id: <int>
data: stop

'. The completion-detection field gamma_sse template was missing is the named SSE event 'done' with body 'stop' (NOT a JSON {type:done}, NOT [DONE], NOT a render_complete field, NOT just a stream-close). Each chunk's data: value can span multiple data: lines that the SSE parser concatenates with newlines. The body emitted by 'content' events is plain UTF-8 text, initially natural-language prose, then a fenced ```md ... ``` block whose interior uses '--- {n}' as card delimiters and '# heading
- bullet' as card body. Request payload uses promptKey='GenerateOutlineStory' + variables.topic + interactionId + workspaceId; response status is 200 (not 201, despite render-generation peer endpoint being 201). To make the client render an APF block warning, emit one or two 'content' events containing the warning text, then immediately the 'done'/'stop' terminator, the client will treat that as a complete generation and render whatever text was streamed. CRITICAL: do NOT close the connection without emitting 'event: done
data: stop' first or the client treats it as an error/incomplete and shows a retry/spinner state.
result.previous_classification: gamma_sse template (etap.log diagnostic): block_but_no_render. APF block fires correctly but envelope shape mismatched. 13+ build iterations on guessed schema all failed at completion-signal detection.
result.diff_from_previous_understanding:
ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED. Previous gamma_sse guesses for completion signal (likely tried [DONE], render_complete:true, type:done JSON, finished:true, etc.) were ALL wrong. Real completion signal = the named SSE event 'done' with body 'stop' (literally 'event: done
data: stop

'). Also identifies the request endpoint precisely (POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation, distinct from gamma.app main domain) and confirms standard SSE transport (text/event-stream, not custom NDJSON). Now have everything for first-shot envelope rewrite.
result.diagnostic_for_dev_team:
MAJOR FINDING for cycle 94 R-18: completion signal is 'event: done
data: stop' (literal SSE event name 'done' + literal payload 'stop'). All 13+ prior gamma_sse template iterations were missing this exact terminator. Recommend new gamma_sse_v2 template emitting: 'event: content
id: 1
data: <warning text>

event: done
id: 2
data: stop

' with Content-Type: text/event-stream. Endpoint match path: POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation (NOT gamma.app/api/...). Verbatim 13-event response in files/598/api_response_body.txt for diff. Render container is div.react-renderer.node-card (visual confirmation should target this).
obstacles_encountered: Already-logged-in session on test PC, no auth wall hit
First click on prompt examples list happened to land on a description that pre-populated the prompt, switched to typing prompt directly into the textarea instead
EventStream Type column was truncated to 'c...' / 'd...'; resolved by using right-click > Copy > Copy response which yielded the full SSE text including the 'event: done' / 'data: stop' terminator
WebSocket warnings (intercom + gamma /graphql) appeared in console but were unrelated to the AI generation flow

subagent_dispatch_meta.soft_timeout_exceeded: Yes (430s > 300s soft); SUCCESS within 8min hard cap
